summary: Curated Linear CLI agent-write surface hardening for issue bodies, comments, documents, labels, promoted GraphQL reads, media uploads, dry-run ordering, and mutation error classification.
reason: Agents need shell-safe Linear writes, full live issue/comment/doc read surfaces, team-safe label handling, and typed failures that preserve uploaded asset recovery URLs when a later mutation fails.
validated_outcome: go test ./... and verify-skill cover the published Linear CLI behavior before PR merge.
